name: adult light small & mini with chicken meal & barley dog food
description: big on love, small in size. hill's science diet small & mini light adult dog food is tailored nutrition for less active adult small & mini dogs requiring a low calorie food to help maintain a healthy weight & lifestyle. specially made with nibble size kibble. low calories & l-carnitine help promote ideal body weight, support healthy mobility & maintain heart function high-quality protein & natural fibers help satisfy hunger between meals nourishing omega-6 & vitamin e blend for healthy skin & luxurious coat contains our special small & mini antioxidant blend for lifelong immune support
